name: freelancers using QuickBooks for expense reporting, processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks for expense reporting, processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent expense reporting causes cash flow gaps. We consolidate expense reports and verify policy compliance instead of manual tracking and reporting in spreadsheets.
target_audience: freelancers using QuickBooks for expense reporting, processing 5–15 invoices/month
problem_solved: Inconsistent expense reporting and compliance verification
features: weekly exception reporting to HR ops
